name: Rabbit Hasenpfeffer.
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients (except the rabbit) in a large bowl.
2. Pour the mixture over the dressed rabbit and let stand in a cool place for 2 days, turning occasionally.
3. Remove the rabbit from the mixture and drain any excess liquid.
4. Pat the rabbit dry with paper towels.
5. Dust the rabbit with flour and brown in hot fat until golden brown.
6. Gradually add 1 cup of the remaining mixture to the rabbit while cooking, stirring constantly.
7. Cover and simmer until the rabbit is tender.
8. Thicken the remaining liquid into a gravy.
